name: Siteminder Limited
analysis: SDR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 52% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$3.8600, stop A$3.2769, target A$6.1700 (3.96:1) — then trail it.
